message:
test: add 7 agent-level integration smoke tests (GAP-9.13)

End-to-end tests with real API keys (gpt-5-mini) covering:
file creation, file read+edit, shell command, tool output
truncation, steering injection, subagent orchestration, and
context timeout. Tests skip when OPENAI_API_KEY is not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
